case_title: JENS SCHNABEL VS. THE ARTISTS ALLEY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SCHNABEL, JENS AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARTISTS ALLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 80.00 - SERVED MAY-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARTISTS ALLEY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHNABEL, JENS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE ARTISTS ALLEY $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $235.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,135.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 80.00 - SERVED MAY-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARTISTS ALLEY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT THE ARTISTS ALLEY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARTISTS ALLEY
